title: Diagnostic chart of hydraulic system failures by CVT symptoms

blocks.text: Diagnostic chart of hydraulic system failures by CVT symptoms

rows.text: Failure Symptoms
checklist
probable cause
Engine will not start.
Inspect drive plate Inspection of torque converter assy. Control wire inspection and adjustment Inspect shift position sensor.

Drive plate damaged Torque converter assy. defective Control wire maladjustment or control wire failure Wire end disconnected, control lever pin broken Shift Position Defective sensor or poor adjustment PGM-FI ECU failure
Engine can start, but cannot start in any position.

Transmission Fluid Level Inspection Inspect shift position sensor. Inspect drive plate Inspection of main valve body assy. Transmission Fluid Strainer Inspection Inspect solenoid harness Transmission Inspect the pulleys and pulley belts in the case. Inspect pulley pressure feed pipe Input shaft inspection Inspect final drive gear and final driven gear. Inspection of differential assy. Inspection of control shaft Comp. Check control levers Inspect parking brake pole and pole shaft. Manual Valve Lever Inspection Inspect oil pump assy. Inspect oil pump drive chain and sprockets Inspection of torque converter assy. Engine power adjustment

Insufficient transmission fluid Shift Position Defective sensor or poor adjustment Drive plate damaged Main valve body assembly. defective Transmission fluid strainer clogged Solenoid Harness failure Defective pulley-related parts Feed Pipe damaged, O-ring defective Pulley pressure feed Pipe damaged, O-ring defective Pulley pressure feed Pipe seal ring defective Input shaft defective, needle bearing damaged Input shaft seal ring defective, O-ring defective Final drive gear, final driven gear damaged Differential Assy. defective Control Shaft Comp. defective Control lever broken Parking brake Pole, pole shaft damaged Manual valve lever damaged, lever pin damaged Defective oil pump assembly. Oil pump Drive chain broken, sprocket broken Oil pump drive sprocket Sealing failure Torque converter assy. defective Insufficient engine power PGM-FI ECU failure Transmission assembly and drive plate installation failure
